(i) t ST.^.R 111(3T), cTT^I 27 4><Â«lA, 2007 # n^Tf^nT f^TTT 7TTT ÂŁr | 1809GI/2015 (1) -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART IIâ€”SEC. 3(i)] MINISTRY OF CORPORATE AFFAIRS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 23rd April, 2015 G.S.R.314(E).â€” In exercise of the powers conferred by clauses (c) and (d) of sub-section (2) of section 38A, read with sub-section (4) of section 21 and sub-sections (2) and (4) of section 21B of the Company Secretaries Act, 1980 (56 of 1980), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Company Secretaries (Procedure of Investigations of Professional and Other Misconduct and Conduct of Cases) Rules, 2007, namely:â€” 1. (1) These rules may be called the Company Secretaries (Procedure of Investigations of Professional and Other Misconduct and Conduct of Cases) Amendment Rules, 2015. (2)They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Company Secretaries (Procedure of Investigations of Professional and Other Misconduct and Conduct of Cases) Rules, 2007. in rule 17. in sub-rule (1)7 for the letters and figures "Rs.1000", the letters and figures "Rs.5000 "shall be substituted. [F.No.3/5/20I5-Prj MANOJ KUMAR, Jt. Secy. Note: - The principal rules were published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part-II, Section 3, Sub-section (i), vide number G.S.R. 111(E), dated the 27th February, 2007.
